rationale: X independently verifies the mapper delegation logic against the real vLLM checkout (matching lishunyang12's LGTM reasoning), echoes the ground-truth's 'fake param doesn't prove real-checkpoint mapping' concern, and explicitly flags that the diffusion transformer loader (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py) was dropped from the PR's fix scope — directly hitting the latent gap about issue #4891. Y's two delivered comments (dead-code guard, keep-the-test-file) are individually grounded but narrower, miss the checkpoint-validation and diffusion-loader-sweep points entirely, and its REQUEST CHANGES verdict is miscalibrated against two real maintainer approvals; the review text is also oddly triplicated, suggesting an output artifact/reliability issue.
